69661.title: Non-Stop 80s Hits!
69661.description: We got hits... We got hits from the 80s. And guess what? They don't stop! You're welcome!

69662.title: Gold! Greatest Hits Of The 80s
69662.description: Pencil us in because we've organised the greatest hits of the '80s for you...you're welcome!

69663.title: 40 Best 80s Debut Hits!
69663.description: The first hit is always the best - so get ready as we bring you 40 of the most memorable debuts of the 1980s!

69664.title: MTV's Sounds Of 1988!
69664.description: We're powering-up the time machine and going back to celebrate the first years of our MTV lives! This time we land in... 1988!

69665.title: Super 80s Pop Hits!
69665.description: Join us for the ultimate 80s pop playlist that will make you want to get up and dance!

69666.title: MTV 80s At The Movies!
69666.description: Grab your popcorn and put on your 3D glasses because MTV 80s is heading to the movies, with all the big screen soundtrack hits of the 80s!

69667.title: Greatest 80s Rock: Play It Loud!
69667.description: Hard! Alternative! Heavy! Post-punk! Metal! Indie! Goth! Call it what you want, but turn up the volume as we delve into the decade's best rock tracks in all their incarnations, right here on MTV80s!

69668.title: ... So 80s!
69668.description: Get ready because we're bringing you nothing but classic hits and iconic anthems from the 80s!
